prompt: Calculate HP’s ROE and compare it to its main competitor
quant_summary: HP Inc. (HPQ) delivered an FY2025 ROE of 26.3%, calculated as $3.1B net income divided by $11.8B average shareholders' equity. This trails Dell Technologies (DELL), its primary competitor in PCs and hardware, which posted 34.7% ROE on $4.2B net income and $12.1B equity. HP's ROE has been stable over two years but lags DELL by an average of 7.3 percentage points, driven mainly by lower profit margins amid supply-chain and pricing pressures.

edges.insight_text: HP's ROE trails Dell by 8.4 points in FY2025 (26.3% vs 34.7%). The gap stems from HP's thinner net margins in a highly competitive PC market, even though both firms maintain similar balance-sheet leverage.

visualizer_pseudo_prompt: Create a grouped bar chart comparing HP Inc. (HPQ, blue bars) and Dell Technologies (DELL, green bars) Return on Equity (%) for FY2025 and FY2024. X-axis: fiscal years. Primary Y-axis: ROE percentage (scale 0-40%). Place exact value labels above each bar. Title: 'HP vs Dell ROE Comparison (FY2024–FY2025)'. Subtitle: 'HP lags by 7.3 pts on average; ROE = Net Income / Avg. Shareholders’ Equity'. Include a legend and a small footnote citing the data source as synthetic financials for testing.
